Notes: Create a previously absent A RRset for ttl.campus.edu. using one UPDATE that adds two RRs with different TTLs. Follow-up QUERY observes whether the server normalized, rejected, or preserved the RRset.

Steps.Description: Add two A records at ttl.campus.edu. in the same UPDATE, but with unequal TTLs (60 and 600). The RRset does not exist beforehand.

Steps.Name: ttl.campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the RRset exists after the UPDATE and whether the server accepted or rejected the mixed-TTL additions.
